title: Handoff Register Demotion
objective: Normalize the handoff register README so it no longer presents itself as the current operator entrypoint after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical register provenance with explicit redirects to the current status and closeout surfaces.
dependency_note: After Packet 106 demoted the old Phase 5 routing ledger, the strongest adjacent current-looking provenance surface was the handoff register README. It still led with current hosted-route and current closure framing even though the file now mainly serves as a historical archive index for parent-root and early repo-era handoffs.
execution_scope: Retitle the handoff register README as historical provenance.
Add explicit post-cutover interpretation and current-routing redirects.
Relabel the remaining current-facing section headings as historical headings without rewriting the body archive listings.
forbidden_scope: broad handoff archive rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The handoff register README now reads as a historical register instead of a live operator entrypoint.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and advances the next lane toward remaining individual handoff records and packet-history index surfaces.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/README.md -Pattern '^# Historical Handoff Register$','^Status: Historical operator-facing handoff register with post-cutover interpretation$','^Current routing:$','^## Historical Hosted Route Promotion Status$','^## Historical Closure Result$'
Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/README.md -Pattern '^## Current Hosted Route Promotion Status$','^## Current Closure Result$','^Current workspace constraint:$'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the remaining individual historical handoff files and packet-history index surfaces that still look current at the top of the file.
